inputs.label: Crawl Space Length
inputs.businessContext: Horizontal dimension (long side) of the crawl space.

inputs.label: Crawl Space Width
inputs.businessContext: Horizontal dimension (short side) of the crawl space.

inputs.label: Crawl Space Height
inputs.businessContext: Vertical distance from dirt floor to bottom of floor joists.

inputs.label: Vent Area Ratio
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of net free vent area to floor area. Building code: 1/150 (no vapor barrier) ≈ 0.00667; 1/1500 (with vapor barrier) ≈ 0.000667.
